ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gnss_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "message_type" TEXT /* Type of GNSS signal (e.g., GPS, GLONASS, Galileo) */,
  "utc_time_millis" TEXT /* UTC time in milliseconds */,
  "time_nanos" TEXT /* Time in nanoseconds */,
  "leap_second" INTEGER /* Leap second information */,
  "full_bias_nanos" TEXT /* Full bias in nanoseconds */,
  "bias_nanos" REAL /* Bias in nanoseconds */,
  "bias_uncertainty_nanos" REAL /* Uncertainty of bias in nanoseconds */,
  "drift_nanos_per_second" REAL /* Drift in nanoseconds per second */,
  "drift_uncertainty_nanos" REAL /* Uncertainty of drift in nanoseconds per second */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GNSS receiver */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the receiver when the signal was captured */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the receiver when the signal was captured */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the receiver when the signal was captured */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gnss_signals_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "constellation_type" TEXT /* Type of constellation (e.g., GPS, GLONASS, Galileo) */,
  "code_type" TEXT /* Type of code (e.g., C/A, P(Y), M) */,
  "orbit_height_km" REAL /* Height of the satellite's orbit in kilometers */,
  "orbital_period_minutes" REAL /* Orbital period of the satellite in minutes */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the satellite was launched */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the satellite (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_quality" (
  "signal_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal quality record */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "cn0_dbhz" REAL /* Signal strength in dBHz */,
  "multipath_indicator" TEXT /* Multipath indicator */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., GPS_L1, GPS_L2) */,
  "carrier_frequency_hz" REAL /* Carrier frequency of the signal in Hz */,
  "phase_lock_indicator" TEXT /* Phase lock indicator */,
  "signal_to_noise_ratio_db" REAL /* Signal-to-noise ratio in dB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_quality_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES gnss_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receiver_data" (
  "receiver_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiver data record */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "time_offset_nanos" TEXT /* Time offset in nanoseconds */,
  "state" INTEGER /* State of the receiver */,
  "received_sv_time_nanos" TEXT /* Received SV time in nanoseconds */,
  "received_sv_time_uncertainty_nanos" TEXT /* Uncertainty of received SV time in nanoseconds */,
  "receiver_model" TEXT /* Model of the GNSS receiver */,
  "receiver_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the GNSS receiver */,
  "receiver_temperature_celsius" REAL /* Temperature of the receiver when the data was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiver_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiver_data_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES gnss_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sv_position" (
  "sv_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SV position record */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "sv_position_x_ecef_meters" REAL /* X-coordinate of the SV position in ECEF meters */,
  "sv_position_y_ecef_meters" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the SV position in ECEF meters */,
  "sv_position_z_ecef_meters" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the SV position in ECEF meters */,
  "sv_elevation_degrees" REAL /* Elevation of the SV in degrees */,
  "sv_azimuth_degrees" REAL /* Azimuth of the SV in degrees */,
  "horizontal_dilution_of_precision" REAL /* Horizontal Dilution of Precision (HDOP) */,
  "vertical_dilution_of_precision" REAL /* Vertical Dilution of Precision (VDOP) */,
  "position_dilution_of_precision" REAL /* Position Dilution of Precision (PDOP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sv_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sv_position_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES gnss_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ionospheric_delay" (
  "ionospheric_delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ionospheric delay record */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "ionospheric_delay_meters" REAL /* Ionospheric delay in meters */,
  "ionospheric_model_used" TEXT /* Model used to calculate the ionospheric delay */,
  "ionospheric_correction_applied" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if ionospheric correction was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ionospheric_delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ionospheric_delay_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES gnss_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tropospheric_delay" (
  "tropospheric_delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tropospheric delay record */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "tropospheric_delay_meters" REAL /* Tropospheric delay in meters */,
  "tropospheric_model_used" TEXT /* Model used to calculate the tropospheric delay */,
  "tropospheric_correction_applied" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if tropospheric correction was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tropospheric_delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tropospheric_delay_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES gnss_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, developer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
